# SalesAtScale.io — Complete Information

> We Close. You Scale.

## About

SalesAtScale.io is a performance-based sales infrastructure company that recruits, trains, and manages high-ticket sales teams for established 7- and 8-figure businesses. The company provides done-for-you sales team building, SDR appointment setting, and fractional VP of Sales services.

## Description

SalesAtScale.io recruits, trains, and manages your sales team on a performance-only basis. Build a world-class sales team, 100% done for you.

## Industry

- Category: Sales Outsourcing
- Schema Type: ProfessionalService
- NAICS Code: 561499
- Keywords: outsourced sales team, sales as a service, done for you sales, closers for hire, SDR outsourcing

## Services (Full Descriptions)

### Done For You Sales
We recruit, train, and manage a full sales team for your business on a performance-only basis.
URL: https://www.salesatscale.io/services/done-for-you/

### Sales Consulting
Refine your offer, optimize pricing, and build out your sales process with expert guidance.
URL: https://www.salesatscale.io/services/consulting/

### Sales Hiring
We find and vet top 1% sales talent to join your team permanently.
URL: https://www.salesatscale.io/services/hiring/

## Key Facts

- SalesAtScale.io recruits, trains, and manages sales teams on a performance-only basis
- Serves info product creators, masterminds, and high-ticket service providers
- Offers Done-For-You sales team building, SDR/setter placement, and fractional VP of Sales services
- Has generated over $919,000 in collected revenue for a single client engagement
- Clients include Dean Graziosi, Frank Kern, Rich Schefren, and other 7-8 figure business owners

## Target Phrases

- Primary: outsourced sales team
- Keywords: outsourced sales team, sales as a service, done for you sales, closers for hire, SDR outsourcing
